purpose: Estimate Twin Card Bedrock image-generation usage and cost using the same unit AWS bills for Stability Image Services.
pricingRegion: US East (N. Virginia), US East (Ohio), US West (Oregon)
rules: AWS prices Stability AI Image Services per generation, not by token count.
Count one billable generation only when a Bedrock image provider completes and returns an image.
Skipped providers and internal fallback_original_photo_card have zero Bedrock model cost.
Failed InvokeModel attempts are recorded with zero estimated generations unless a generated image was returned.
This tracks Bedrock model inference cost only; it does not include S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway, CloudWatch, or data-transfer charges.
